author: Claude Code
content:
Starting work. Root cause: both hooks have `REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)` followed by `if [ -z "$REPO_ROOT" ]; then exit 0; fi` — no git repo means no enforcement.

Fix plan:
1. `init.sh`: add `git init` when not in a git repo
2. Both hooks: add fallback to walk up from CWD looking for `.project/`
3. Sync template
